definition.en: Within the context of my discussion, reincarnation is Seth's historical version of his counterpart concept, which is that each of us is physically connected with certain other males and females who are living at the same time we are, and who are exploring physical life from a variety of viewpoints in ways that no one physical self could possibly match.
definition.zh: 在我的讨论脉络中，转世是赛斯对其对应人物概念的历史版本，即我们每个人在生理上都与某些同时代生活的其他男性和女性相连，他们正以单一物质自我无法企及的方式，从多种视角探索物质生命。

definition.en: When most people think of reincarnation, they think in terms of a one-line progression in which the soul perfects itself in each succeeding life. This is a gross simplification.
definition.zh: 当大多数人想到转世时，他们想到的是灵魂在每一世中自我完善的线性进程。这是一种粗糙的简化。

definition.en: Now: conversely, if you do not accept the idea of reincarnation, this does not mean that reincarnation is not a fact. It does mean that this insufficient energy will keep this reality at such a low ebb that it will not sufficiently materialize as an event within your system.
definition.zh: 反之，如果你不接受转世的概念，这并不意味着转世不是事实。它确实意味着这种不足的能量将使这个实相保持在如此低的水平，以至于它不会在你的系统内充分物质化为一个事件。

definition.en: Reincarnation is but a part of this probability system, the part that falls within your particular universe.
definition.zh: 转世只是这个概率系统的一部分，是落在你特定宇宙中的那部分。

definition.en: I want to stress that reincarnation is a tool used by personalities. They each use it in their own way.
definition.zh: 我想强调，转世是人格所使用的工具。他们各自以自己的方式使用它。

explanation: 轮回并非灵魂在时间线上依次转世、逐步完善自身的线性过程。每个个体在同一时代都有一群“对应自我”，他们从不同视角探索物质实相，彼此在非物质层面相互连接，如同不断变化的齿轮系统。你所谓的“前世”与“来世”其实是同时存在的，只是因为人类执着于过去、现在、未来的时间观念，才被迫将它们视为先后顺序。真正的存在是单一的，只是意识无法同时处理全部信息，才将其分割成看似不同的片段。如果你不相信轮回，这并不意味着轮回不存在，而是你的能量不足以让它在你的系统中显化为可感知的事件。轮回只是概率系统的一部分，是能量在特定宇宙中的运作方式。理解轮回必须结合对应自我的概念，两者密不可分。

quotes.text: We're not against reincarnation, then, only careful about our beliefs concerning it. Within the context of my discussion, reincarnation is Seth's historical version of his counterpart concept, which is that each of us is physically connected with certain other males and females who are living at the same time we are, and who are exploring physical life from a variety of viewpoints in ways that no one physical self could possibly match. This means that each reincarnational self has its own cluster of counterpart selves within its own time period, and that all are interconnected on nonphysical levels, joining together like magical gears meshing in constantly changing patterns across time and reality. And once one understands ideas of reincarnation and counterparts in these terms, it becomes difficult to think of one without the other, so inevitable do they appear to be.
quotes.translation: 我们并非反对转世，只是对相关信念保持审慎。在我讨论的脉络中，转世是赛斯对其"对等人物"概念的历史性诠释——即我们每个人与同时代生活的某些其他男女存在物理性连结，他们正以单一物质自我无法企及的多重角度探索物质实相。这意味着每个转世自我在其时代周期中都拥有自己的对等人物集群，所有存在在非物质层面相互联结，如同魔法齿轮般在时空与实相中不断变换咬合模式。一旦以这种视角理解转世与对等人物，两者便如影随形，其必然性昭然若揭。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: I referred to a "successful" progression because reaching into the future is evidently much more difficult. By its very nature a future life cannot be proven--records checked, and so forth. Anything goes. Jane and I have read of many systems designed to regress the individual to past lives. Often such "trips" are mediated by hypnosis. It can even happen spontaneously, and I had a most exhilarating glimpse of a past life of my own that way. (See Session 721 in Volume 2 of "Unknown" Reality.) However, neither of us have had such an outright encounter with a future self--that we know of. I'd say that under hypnosis the urge to fantasize the future lives must be a tempting one; but what's the explanation for achieving little more than a formless future state while "under," no matter how hard one tries? The failure to get there, to turn time around, could be taken as a sign of resistance on the part of the present self. (Or even a past self or selves, but that's too complicated a subject to go into here.)
source_raw.chapter_title: Chapter 6: Genetic Heritage and Reincarnational Predilections

quotes.text: When most people think of reincarnation, they think in terms of a one-line progression in which the soul perfects itself in each succeeding life. This is a gross simplification. There are endless varieties of this one theme, individual variations. The process of reincarnation is used in many ways, therefore, and in this time of rest individuals must decide on the unique way in which reincarnation will be of use.
quotes.translation: 多数人谈及转世时，总将其视为灵魂在连续生命中逐步完善的线性进程。这实为过度简化。同一主题下存在无数变奏与个体差异。转世机制因此被多元运用，在此休憩阶段，每个个体必须抉择转世将如何以独特方式发挥作用。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Now: conversely, if you do not accept the idea of reincarnation, this does not mean that reincarnation is not a fact. It does mean that this insufficient energy will keep this reality at such a low ebb that it will not sufficiently materialize as an event within your system. For the egotistical self it will be a non-fact and the physical senses will of course find no Sense data to confirm reincarnation.
quotes.translation: 反之，若你不接受转世概念，这并不意味着转世非事实。它仅代表这种匮乏的能量将使此实相处于如此低潮，以致无法在你的系统内充分显化为事件。对自我本位而言，这将成为非事实，物质感官自然找不到任何感官数据来证实转世。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: As in many cases an old man will appear womanish, so a personality reincarnated steadily as a male will develop strong and overly compensated for female characteristics, as is the case with Loren in this existence. The very fact that the personality evades a female reincarnation is evidence of an already developed fear. The personality of Loren, you see, is basically female despite the fact that he has never had a female reincarnation. This led to the confusion.
quotes.translation: 正如老翁常显女相，持续转世为男性的性格会发展出强烈且过度补偿的女性特质，洛伦此生的状况即是明证。性格逃避女性转世这一事实本身，正是已发展出恐惧的明证。洛伦的性格本质上是女性化的，尽管他从未有过女性转世经历，这导致了混淆。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: This is simplified. Consciously you deal with those problems of one given physical life. Consciously you are not aware of what you call reincarnations, though these occur within your own system. Now these are not separate existences at all. They only appear so to you. Your earth identity (smile) in singular terms, is one existence. When you sleep at night and awaken, you do not suppose yourself a new personality, or imagine that you have died during the night. This is what you do when you imagine that you have several existences as different people. Your real existence, even within your system, is too much for you to deal with in conscious terms, therefore the seeming segments. You know you live these seemingly different lives simultaneously, as you gain development, but it is always you gaining development in a variety of roles. I stress therefore that unity. It is only because consciously you do not realize the unity that the various reincarnations seem so diverse and separate.
quotes.translation: 此为简化说明。意识层面你处理特定物质生命的问题，意识层面你无法察觉所谓转世，尽管这些确实发生在你的系统内。这些绝非独立存在，只是对你而言显得如此。你们的地球身份（微笑）以单数形式存在，实则是一体存在。当你夜间入睡清晨醒来，不会自认是新人格，或想象自己夜间已死。这正是你想象自己以不同人格经历多次存在时的认知状态。即便在你的系统内，真实存在也远超意识层面所能处理，因此才呈现片段化。随着发展，你终将知晓这些看似不同的生命是同时经历的，但始终是你在各种角色中获取发展。我因此强调这种统一性。正因意识层面未能认知这种统一，各种转世才显得如此纷繁割裂。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: We prefer instead Seth's -- as well as our own -- concepts of the inviolate nature of the individual consciousness, before, during, and after physical existence, in ordinary terms, and whether or not any theory of reincarnation is involved. It may be natural enough for us in the West not to enjoy the idea of surrendering our individual natures upon physical death, even if intellectually we can understand, for instance, the Buddhist teaching that "perfect" joy can be found in the eventual, blissful surrender of the self to a supreme spirit -- although I note with some humor that personally I've yet to determine how the self who surrenders knows it's done so if it's been so thoroughly absorbed.
quotes.translation: 我们更倾向赛斯——以及我们自身——关于个体意识在物质存在前后及期间不可侵犯本质的概念，无论是否涉及任何转世理论。对西方人而言，自然难以接受物质死亡后放弃个体本性的概念，即便理智上能理解佛教教义——例如在最终将自我喜乐地交付至高灵性时获得"圆满"喜悦——尽管我略带幽默地指出，若自我已被彻底吸收，我尚不确定交付者如何知晓自己已完成交付。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: Every so often I've thought of averaging Jane's dictation time for Seth Speaks and Personal Reality in the same way, but haven't done so. I'm somewhat puzzled to note, however, that her very short working times for the Seth books seem to be either ignored or taken for granted by practically everyone -- or, perhaps, those factors just aren't understood in terms of ordinary linear time. Maybe I'm alone in my interest here, for even Jane doesn't express any great curiosity about the time she has invested in the Seth material; she just delivers it. But given her abilities, I think her speed of production is a close physical approach to, or translation of, Seth's idea that basically all exists at once -- that really there is no time, and that the Seth books, for example, are "there" to be had in final form for just the tuning in. (In Section 3 of this volume, Note 2 for Session 692 contains information on another way by which we can move closer to Seth's idea of simultaneity from our physical reality, but that method grows out of material not discussed here.)
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: I am using you here and the physician probability as an example. Art, you see, is also closely connected with healing. The projections of which I spoke do happen occasionally and spontaneously on both of your parts. Various aspects of the personality are being developed, you see. Reincarnation is but a part of this probability system, the part that falls within your particular universe. This all involves value fulfillment, which is at its basis. It is obvious then that you perceive consciously only a small part of your own overall reality. The doctor obviously has his own ego, though not within your system.
quotes.translation: 我在此以你和那位医师的可能性为例。艺术，你看，也与疗愈紧密相连。我所说的投射确实会偶尔自发地发生在你们双方身上。人格的各个层面正在被发展，你看。转世只是这个可能性系统的一部分，是落在你们特定宇宙中的那部分。这一切都涉及价值完成，这是其基础。显然，你只意识到自己整体实相的一小部分。那位医师显然有他自己的自我，尽管不在你的系统内。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Because you are obsessed with the idea of time as past, present and future, you are forced to think of reincarnations as strung out one before the other, and indeed we speak of past lives simply because you are used to the time sequence concept. What you have of course, loosely speaking, is something like the developments narrated in The Three Faces of Eve. You have various dominant egos, all part of an inner identity, dominant in various existences. To make the concept understandable to you it is convenient to speak of past and future reincarnations.
quotes.translation: 因为你执著于过去、现在和未来的时间观念，你被迫认为转世是一个接一个排列的，而我们确实谈论前世，仅仅因为你习惯了时间序列的概念。粗略地说，你所拥有的，有点像《三面夏娃》中叙述的发展。你有各种主导自我，都是内在身份的一部分，在不同的存在中占据主导。为了让这个概念为你所理解，方便起见，我们谈论过去和未来的转世。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: At such times I'm apt to think about ideas of reincarnation and counterparts. Right here I'm dealing with just two of Seth's larger concepts. But without dwelling upon them too heavily, I may consider the notion of my larger, nonphysical "whole self" or "entity" being made up of a number of other psychically related physical selves projected into time. For Seth, basically there is no time, only a great "spacious present" that's a manifestation of a sublime, indescribable All That Is. Our gross physical senses, and indeed our very bodies, insist upon interpreting the spacious present in linear terms, however--through the inevitable processes of birth, aging, and death--so to help us get his point here Seth advances his ideas of reincarnational selves and counterpart selves in ways we can understand sensually.
quotes.translation: 在这种时候，我往往会思考转世和对等体的概念。这里我仅涉及赛斯两个较大的概念。但不过分深究，我可以考虑我的更大、非物质的"整体自己"或"存有"由许多其他心灵相关的物质自己投射到时间中组成。对赛斯来说，基本上没有时间，只有一个伟大的"广阔当下"，是崇高、难以描述的"一切万有"的显现。然而，我们粗重的物质感官，甚至我们的身体本身，坚持用线性术语解释这个广阔当下——通过出生、衰老和死亡的必然过程——所以为了帮助我们理解他的观点，赛斯以我们能感官理解的方式提出他的转世自己和对等体自己的概念。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: Even in God of Jane, which was published in 1981, Jane presented some relatively late material from Seth to show that he doesn't independently communicate with others. The idea that he'd done so can be inspiring, however. In Chapter 20 of her book, see Session 876 for August 27, 1979. After explaining how a couple of women (among others) had recently claimed that he had been in contact with them, Seth stated: "Now, I did not communicate with those women--but their belief in me helped each of them use certain abilities."
source_raw.chapter_title: Chapter 6: Genetic Heritage and Reincarnational Predilections

quotes.text: The psychology of personality cannot be grasped unless reincarnation is taken into consideration, but even then this only represents energy operating within one system. The personality operates simultaneously within many systems. Projection represents practical application. Such experience allows you to unite various aspects of the self, and to bring the whole self into sharper focus. As a rule projection in some areas can only be achieved by those who are living their last earthly cycle.
quotes.translation: 除非考虑转世，否则人格心理学无法被掌握，但即便如此，这也只代表能量在一个系统内运作。人格同时在许多系统内运作。投射代表了实际应用。这种体验让你能够联合自己的各个层面，并将整体自己带入更清晰的焦点。通常，某些领域的投射只能由那些正在经历最后一世地球周期的人实现。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: It is difficult to explain to you in terms you can understand. I will make an analogy, which however will be imperfect. We will take reincarnation as a basis. Imagine that you have had ten reincarnations. These reincarnations all represent portions of your entity, living or experiencing sensation at various times within a physical time system.
quotes.translation: 很难用你能理解的术语向你解释。我将做一个类比，但这将是不完美的。我们将以转世为基础。想象你有过十次转世。这些转世都代表你存有的部分，在物质时间系统内的不同时间生活或体验感觉。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: (From the 82nd session for August 27, 1964:) When man realizes that he creates his own image now, he will not find it so startling to believe that he creates other images in other times. Only after such a basis [is established] will the idea of reincarnation achieve its natural validity, and only when it is understood that the subconscious, certain layers of it, is a link between the present personality and past ones, will the theory of reincarnation be accepted as fact.
quotes.translation: （摘自1964年8月27日第82节课：）当人意识到他现在创造自己的形象时，他就不会觉得相信他在其他时间创造其他形象如此令人震惊。只有在这种基础[建立]之后，转世的观念才能获得其自然的有效性，只有当潜意识、其某些层面被理解为当前人格与过去人格之间的连接时，转世理论才会被接受为事实。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: (However, from Session 14 [for January 8, 1964], there's other material that can be given here, as well as some that makes an interesting note at the end of this appendix.4 First, from my own note at 11:05: "Jane said that Seth was quite pleased with the new voice, and that she now knows what he's thinking sometimes, even though he doesn't relay it to or through her as part of a message."

quotes.text: This happens fairly often. It does not change the fact that it is the last reincarnation cycle for parents for example, although it may be lonely for the child in such an instance. I have not gone into these questions; however, to some degree in the subconscious mind you have what could be called a ghost image of your ancestors, and when your parents are in their last reincarnation cycle they leave your plane and it is more difficult for the ghost image to be imprinted.
quotes.translation: 这种情况相当常见。举例来说，这并不会改变父母正处于最后一次转世周期的事实，尽管在这种情况下孩子可能会感到孤独。我尚未深入探讨这些问题；然而，在潜意识的某个层面上，你们拥有可称为祖先"鬼影"的东西，当你们的父母处于最后一次转世周期时，他们会离开你们的层面，使得这个鬼影更难被铭印。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: I will tell you the book, in what Ruburt thinks of as its somewhat inane simplicity, is very profound. Nevertheless for others there are steps that must be followed through, and following these steps through brings the whole personality, including the intellect, to a more balanced understanding, which is my goal. The author, while basically correct, ignores for example the reality of reincarnation; and Ruburts protests to the contrary, reincarnation belongs both with metaphysics and psychology, and cannot be ignored.
quotes.translation: 我要告诉你们，鲁柏认为那本书过于简单幼稚，但实际上它非常深奥。不过对其他人而言，必须遵循某些步骤，而遵循这些步骤能使整个人格——包括智力——达到更平衡的理解，这正是我的目标。那位作者虽然基本正确，却忽略了转世的现实；而鲁柏虽持相反意见，但转世既属于形而上学也属于心理学范畴，不容忽视。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: I also know that in a couple of chapters for Dreams itself Seth referred to the genetic factors involving reincarnation. He said that basically both our genetic structure and our reincarnational history are systems of consciousness, that they're "intermixed." The former is physical, the latter is psychic, a part of our inner bank of knowledge. I don't doubt that he's right--that is, in our temporal lifetimes we call upon whatever systems of consciousness we desire to, at whatever "time": a matter of choice and free will operating within the broad parameters of our sexual orientation and other personality factors.
quotes.translation: 我也知道在《梦》的几章中，赛斯提到了涉及转世的遗传因素。他说我们的遗传结构和转世历史本质上都是意识系统，它们是"相互混合"的。前者是物质的，后者是心灵的，是我们内在知识库的一部分。我不怀疑他是对的——也就是说，在我们现世的生命中，我们可以在任何"时间"调用任何我们想要的意识系统：这是在性取向和其他人格因素的广泛参数内，由选择和自由意志运作的结果。

quotes.text: I do not believe that Dunne understood this. There is no serialization as he imagined, after a certain point, simply because this progression of selves through various times in a serial fashion is no longer necessary. The selves reach a point which is not a theoretical point, but a particular mathematically existent point, whereby these times and selves simply become one, or in our terms, an entity. I must stress that individuality is never lost. But this is too complicated a subject to cover this evening. We have explained it rather adequately in terms of action however, and gestalts of selves do not imply a giving-up of individuality at all. It should be remembered here that reincarnation is simply a fact, and one which is not accepted by Priestley or Dunne.
quotes.translation: 我不认为邓恩理解了这一点。不存在他想象的那种序列化过程，在某个点之后，仅仅是因为这种以序列方式穿越不同时间的自我演进已不再必要。自我们达到一个点——这不是理论上的点，而是一个特定的数学存在点——在这些点上，时间和自我们简单地合而为一，或者用我们的术语说，成为一个"存有"。我必须强调，个体性从未丧失。但这主题过于复杂，今晚无法涵盖。不过，我们已用"行动"的概念相当充分地解释过，而自我的完形绝不意味着放弃个体性。这里应记住，转世只是一个事实，一个普里斯特利和邓恩都不接受的事实。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: There are points in that book which we have not yet discussed, for the ground has not been prepared sufficiently. Reincarnation and projection are as real and as difficult for the ego to grasp, as the nature of dreams. You can begin to understand the effect of dreams at least upon your daily life. Reincarnations and projections of which you are not consciously aware have an equal effect, a stronger effect, upon your daily existence.
quotes.translation: 那本书中有一些我们尚未讨论的要点，因为基础尚未充分准备。转世和投射与梦的本质一样真实，也像梦一样难以被自我理解。你们至少可以开始理解梦对日常生活的影响。而你们没有意识到的转世和投射，对你们的日常存在有着同等甚至更强的影响。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: I admit to you reincarnation does seem to have such implications. This is simply because you insist upon considering reincarnation in the light of time theories that are themselves incorrect. You must instead consider reincarnation in the light of what you know of the spacious present.
quotes.translation: 我向你们承认，转世确实似乎有这样的含义。这只是因为你们坚持用本身就不正确的时间理论来思考转世。相反，你们必须根据对"广袤的当下"的理解来思考转世。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: Any true psychic development of personality, however, is bound to lead to an understanding of the nature of the psyche that is far too large for any such confusion of basic identity with sexuality. The concept of reincarnation itself clearly shows the change of sexual orientation, and the existence of a self that is apart from its sexual orientation, even while it is also expressed through a given sexual stance. To a good extent, sexual beliefs are responsible for the blocking-out of reincarnational awareness. Such "memory" would necessarily acquaint you with experiences most difficult to correlate with your current sexual roles. Those other-sex existences are present to the psyche unconsciously. They are a portion of your personality. In so specifically identifying with your sex, therefore, you also inhibit memories that might limit or destroy that identification.
quotes.translation: 然而，任何真正的人格灵性发展，都必然导向对心灵本质的理解——这个心灵远比任何将基本身份与性别混淆的认知要宏大得多。轮回转世的概念本身就清楚显示了性取向的变化，以及一个独立于性取向的自我存在，即使它同时也通过特定的性别立场来表达。在很大程度上，性别信念正是阻碍轮回觉知的原因。这种"记忆"必然会让你接触到与你当前性别角色最难关联的经历。那些异性的存在潜在于心灵的无意识层面，它们是你人格的一部分。因此，当你过分认同自己的性别时，你也会抑制那些可能削弱或摧毁这种认同的记忆。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Religion was hampered--and is--by its own interpretation of good and evil, but it did not deny the existence of other versions of consciousness, or differing kinds of psychological activity and life. (Long pause.) Reincarnation suggests, of course, the extension of personal existence beyond one time period, independently of one bodily form, the translation or transmission of intelligence through nonphysical frameworks, and implies psychological behavior, memory and desire as purposeful action without the substance of any physical mechanism--propositions that science at its present stage of development simply could not buy, and for which it could find no evidence, for its methods would automatically preclude the type of experience that such evidence would require.
quotes.translation: 宗教曾受——且仍受——其自身对善恶的诠释所阻碍，但它并未否认其他意识版本、或不同种类的心理活动与生命的存在。（长停顿）轮回转世当然暗示着个人存在超越单一时间段的延伸，独立于单一形体之外，通过非物理框架传递或传输智能，并意味着心理行为、记忆和欲望作为有目的的行动，无需任何物理机制的物质基础——这些命题在科学目前的发展阶段根本无法接受，也找不到证据，因为科学的方法会自动排除这类证据所需的经验类型。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-08-10-08Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_Tow - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: Jane doesn't agree with my doubts. As always, she's been letting me put this book together the way I think best--and inevitably that way has followed how we've been trying to understand our joint long-term situation. She innocently accepts my labors as they come out. And that trust always reflects, I'm sure, Seth's own larger view of reality, as I just quoted him from Session 915. Our challenges echo throughout all of our probable realities simultaneously, and through all of them together the largest picture of Jane and myself is presented. In this probable reality we work with what we can pick up from that great whole. We keep trying to learn to ask better questions.

quotes.text: When you think in terms of mankind solving its own problems, remember that reincarnation is involved, and not a group of persons in existence for only a particular time. When the personality is thoroughly ready to leave the body, nothing, including transplants, will keep it within the body. And if personalities refuse to inhabit a new body, then no science will be able to give life to the newly formed but uninhabited body.
quotes.translation: 当你思考人类解决自身问题时，请记住轮回转世也参与其中，而非仅存在于特定时期的一群人。当人格彻底准备好离开身体时，没有任何东西——包括器官移植——能将其留在体内。如果人格拒绝进驻新身体，那么任何科学都无法赋予那新形成却无人居住的身体以生命。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: When man realizes that he creates his own image now, he will not find it so startling to believe that he creates other images in other times. Only after such a basis will the idea of reincarnation achieve its natural validity, and only when it is understood that the subconscious, certain layers of it, is a link between the present personality and past ones, will the theory of reincarnation be accepted as fact.
quotes.translation: 当人类意识到自己此刻正在创造自身形象时，就不会觉得相信自己在其他时代创造其他形象如此惊世骇俗。只有在此基础之上，轮回转世的概念才能获得其自然的有效性；只有当人们理解潜意识——其特定层次——是当前人格与过去人格之间的纽带时，轮回转世的理论才会被接受为事实。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Reincarnational goals also vary greatly. I want to stress that reincarnation is a tool used by personalities. They each use it in their own way. Some enjoy female existences, or have greater fondness for male lives. While both must be encountered, there is a great range of choice and activity. Some personalities will have difficulties along certain lines, and develop with relative ease in other ways.
quotes.translation: 轮回的目标也千差万别。我想强调，轮回是人格使用的一种工具。每个人格都以自己的方式运用它。有些人偏爱女性存在，或更偏好男性生活。虽然两者都必须经历，但选择与活动的范围极为广阔。某些人格会在特定方面遇到困难，而在其他方面则相对容易发展。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: There is enough evidence to build an excellent case for life after death. All of this involves direct experience--episodes, encountered by individuals, [that are] highly suggestive of the after death hypothesis; but the hypothesis is never taken seriously by your established sciences. There is far more evidence for reincarnation and life after death than there is, for example, for the existence of black holes. (With amusement:) Few people have seen a black hole, to make the most generous statement possible, while countless people have had private reincarnational experiences, or encounters that suggest the survival of the personality beyond death.
quotes.translation: 有足够证据可以为死后生命构建一个有力的案例。这一切都涉及直接经验——个体遭遇的片段，强烈暗示死后存在的假说；但这个假说从未被你们的既定科学认真对待。轮回转世与死后生命的证据，远比例如黑洞存在的证据要多得多。（带着趣味：）最宽容地说，很少有人见过黑洞，而无数人却有过私人的轮回经验，或暗示人格在死后存续的遭遇。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Others of a more placid nature will take their problems one at a time. Rest periods may also be taken, and they are highly therapeutic. For example, an excellent, satisfying life with a minimum of problems may be chosen either as a prelude to a life of concentrated challenge or as a self-adopted reward for a previous difficult life. Those that thoroughly enjoy the physical medium, without being obsessed by it, however, do very well indeed. The "laws" of reincarnation are adapted by the individual personalities to suit themselves.
quotes.translation: 性情较平和者会逐一处理问题，也可安排休息时段，这些休息极具疗愈效果。例如，可选择一段问题极少、令人满意的生活，作为专注挑战人生的前奏，或作为对前段艰难人生的自我奖赏。那些充分享受物质媒介却不受其困扰的人，确实能活得很好。转世的"法则"由个体人格自行调整以适应自身需求。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The entire idea of reincarnation has been highly distorted by other religious concepts. It is not a psychological arena composed of crime and punishment. Again, you have free will in the conditions of your life, given the characteristics that are your own. The great facility and adaptability of the human species are dependent upon an amazing interplay between genetic preciseness and genetic freedom. The very characteristic attributes of the species, its dependability and integrity, are dependent upon constant checks and balances, the existence of divergent characteristics against which the species can measure itself.
quotes.translation: 转世的整体概念已被其他宗教观念严重扭曲。它并非由罪与罚构成的心理竞技场。再次强调，在赋予你自身特质的前提下，你对自己的生命境遇拥有自由意志。人类物种的卓越适应力与灵活性，依赖于基因精确性与基因自由性之间令人惊叹的相互作用。该物种特有的属性——其可靠性与完整性——依赖于持续的制衡机制，以及可供物种自我衡量的差异性特质的存在。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-08-10-08Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_Tow - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: (See the beginning of this Session 909 in Chapter 6 for Volume 1 of Dreams. As Seth, Jane had started delivering the session at 9:05 P.M. on Monday, April 21, 1980.)

quotes.text: Channels, psychological and psychic, always exist, sending communications back and forth through the various levels of the self, and the ego accepts necessary information and data from inner portions of the personality without question. Its position in fact depends in a large manner upon this unquestioning acceptance of inner data. The ego, in other words, the "exterior" self that you think of as your self -- that portion of you maintains its safety and its seeming command precisely because inner layers of your own personality constantly uphold it, keep the physical body operating, and maintain communications with the multitudinous stimuli that come both from outside conditions and inside conditions. The soul or entity is not diminished but expanded through reincarnations, through existence and experience in probable realities -- something that I will explain later.
quotes.translation: 心理与灵性的通道始终存在，在自我的各个层面间来回传递讯息。自我会不加质疑地接受来自人格内在部分的必要信息与数据。事实上，自我的地位在很大程度上正依赖于对这种内在数据的无条件接纳。换言之，你视为"自我"的那个"外在"自我——你人格的这一部分之所以能维持其安全与表面掌控，恰恰因为内在人格层不断支撑着它，维持肉体运作，并与来自内外环境的无数刺激保持沟通。灵魂或存有通过转世、通过可能实相中的存在与体验（这点我稍后会解释）而得以扩展而非缩减。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: When you realize that a bullet cannot kill a man, then you will not need to kill. All of you have lived before, and many of you will live in physical form again. Some of you will be finished with earthly reincarnations after this life. There is a boy in a third or fourth seat, back from the front in the left row, toward the wall. He is on the last reincarnation within this system.
quotes.translation: 当你意识到子弹无法杀死一个人时，你便不再需要杀戮。你们所有人都曾活过，许多人还将再次以肉身形式存在。有些人此生之后将结束地球转世。在左侧第三或第四排座位、靠近墙壁的位置有个男孩，他正处于此系统中的最后一次转世。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: When you leave the physical system after reincarnations, you have learned the lessons, and you are literally no longer a member of the human race in those terms, for you elect to leave it. Only the conscious self dwells within it in any case, and it is other portions of your personality who simultaneously dwell within the other training systems. In other more advanced systems, thoughts and emotions are automatically and immediately translated into action, into camouflage, into whatever approximation of matter there exists. Therefore the lessons must be taught and learned well.
quotes.translation: 当你在转世后离开物质系统时，你已学会该学的功课，从那个角度而言你已不再是人类成员，因为你选择离开它。无论如何，只有意识自我栖居于其中，而你人格的其他部分同时栖居于其他训练系统中。在更先进的系统中，思想与情感会自动且立即转化为行动、幻相、以及任何近似物质的存在。因此，这些功课必须被妥善教导与学习。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Those of you who believe in reincarnation in more or less conventional terms, can make the error of using or blaming "past" lives, organizing them through your current beliefs. It is bad enough to believe that you are at the mercy of one past, but to consider yourself helpless before innumerable previous errors from other lives puts you in an impossible situation; the conscious will is robbed of its power to act. Such lives exist simultaneously. They are other expressions of yourself, interacting, but with each conscious self possessing the point of power in its own present.
quotes.translation: 那些以或多或少传统方式相信转世的人，可能会犯下利用或归咎"前世"的错误，通过当前信念来组织它们。相信受制于一个过去已经够糟了，但若认为自己面对无数其他生命的过往错误而无力回天，则会使你陷入绝境；意识意志将被剥夺行动的力量。这些生命同时存在。它们是你自身的其他表达，相互交织，但每个意识自我都在其当下拥有力量之点。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

related_concepts.name_en: The point of power is in the present

quotes.text: These fundamental laws are followed on many levels in your own universe. So far I have given you but one, which is value fulfillment. In your physical universe this rule is followed as physical growth. The entity follows it through the cycle of [simultaneous] reincarnations. The species of mankind, and all other species in your universe on your particular horizontal plane, follow this law [value fulfillment] under the auspices of evolution (my emphasis).5 In other camouflage realities, this law is carried through in different manners, but it is never ignored.
quotes.translation: 这些基本法则在你自己的宇宙中于许多层面被遵循。到目前为止，我只给了你一个法则，即价值完成。在你的物质宇宙中，这个法则被遵循为物质成长。存有通过[同时]转世的循环遵循它。人类物种，以及你宇宙中在你特定水平面上的所有其他物种，都在演化的赞助下遵循这个法则[价值完成]（我的强调）。在其他伪装实相中，这个法则以不同方式被贯彻，但它从未被忽视。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: (FOR SESSION 705)
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: I will give you theoretical material, and I hope that we shall implement it with our own demonstrations. The coming sessions will of necessity involve us thoroughly in the nature of human personality in its psychic electromagnetic properties. Reincarnation will, of course, enter in here, for you cannot separate it. I am more solidly here in our sessions now (smile, eyes open) than I was permitted to be in the past. It goes without saying that there is no other place in those terms, into which those who have survived physical death disappear.
quotes.translation: 我将给你理论性的资料，我希望我们将用自己的示范来实践它。未来的课必然会使我们彻底涉及人类人格在其心灵电磁特性方面的本质。当然，转世会在这里介入，因为你无法将它分开。我现在在我们的课中比过去被允许的更稳固地在这里（微笑，睁眼）。不用说，在这些术语中，没有其他地方让那些经历过肉体死亡的人消失。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: According to other religions, you may be "earthbound" by the "gross desires" of your nature, "bound to the wheel of life," condemned to endless reincarnations until you are "purified." As I have said before, according to psychology and science, you are a living conglomeration of elements and chemicals, spawned by a universe without purpose, itself accidentally formed, and you are given a life in which all the "primitive and animalistic" drives of your evolutionary past ever lurk within you, awaiting expression and undermining your control.
quotes.translation: 根据其他宗教，你可能被你本性的"粗俗欲望"所"束缚"，"被绑在生命之轮上"，被判无尽的转世，直到你被"净化"。正如我以前说过的，根据心理学和科学，你是一个元素和化学物质的活生生的集合体，由一个没有目的、本身偶然形成的宇宙所产生，你被赋予一个生命，其中你进化过去的所有"原始和动物性"驱力永远潜伏在你之内，等待表达并破坏你的控制。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events

quotes.text: In one lifetime's work you can learn what it might otherwise take three reincarnations to learn. You are all involved basically with one thing. You are learning to use energy creatively. You are trying to discover how much energy you can direct, what you can create. You can discover these answers for yourselves. You cannot discover them through reading, you must look within yourselves and open your own doors. This is a joyful endeavor.
quotes.translation: 在一生的工作中，你可以学到否则可能需要三次转世才能学到的东西。你们基本上都涉及一件事。你们正在学习创造性地使用能量。你们试图发现自己能引导多少能量，能创造什么。你们可以自己发现这些答案。你们无法通过阅读发现它们，必须向内看并打开自己的门。这是一个充满喜悦的努力。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: We have mentioned reincarnation hardly at all (but see the 631st session in Chapter Seven), yet here let me state that the theory is a conscious-mind interpretation in linear terms. On the one hand it is highly distorted. On the other hand it is a creative interpretation, as the conscious mind plays with reality as it understands it. But in the terms used there is no karma to be paid off as punishment unless you believe that there are crimes for which you must pay (as indicated in the 614th session in Chapter Two).
quotes.translation: 我们几乎完全没有提到转世（但见第七章第631节），然而在这里让我说明，这个理论是意识心在线性术语中的诠释。一方面它高度扭曲。另一方面它是一个创造性的诠释，因为意识心在玩味它理解的实相。但在所用的术语中，没有业力需要作为惩罚来偿还，除非你相信有你必须偿还的罪行（如第二章第614节所指出的）。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: The whole self slowly regains knowledge of its own reincarnations, and learns of its relationship to its own entity. I have said that a personality may become another entity. There is no rule against it. It is a matter of inherent strength and ability and also of desire. Many personalities upon receiving knowledge of their entity prefer to remain part of it, though they are always independent individualities within the whole entity, as even the cells of your physical bodies are part of the whole self.
quotes.translation: 整体自己慢慢重新获得对其自身转世的知识，并了解它与自己存有的关系。我曾说过一个人格可能变成另一个存有。没有规则禁止这一点。这是一个内在力量和能力的，以及欲望的问题。许多人格在接收到关于其存有的知识后，宁愿保持为其一部分，尽管他们在整体存有内始终是独立的个体，就像你肉体的细胞是整体自己的一部分一样。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: With them you may discuss your experience during reincarnational cycles. These are like old friends. The teachers, for example, are themselves within a cycle. The more advanced ones have already encountered the systems of reincarnation and probabilities, and are themselves deciding upon the "future" nature of their own experience. Their choices, however, are not your choices. While I may mention some other realms of existence open to them in a later chapter, we will not be involved with them here.
quotes.translation: 你可以与他们讨论你在转世周期中的经历。他们如同老友一般。例如，导师们自身也处于一个周期之中。更进阶的导师已经接触过转世与或然性的体系，并正在决定自身经验"未来"的本质。然而他们的选择并非你的选择。虽然我可能在后续章节提及他们可触及的其他存在领域，但我们在此不会深入探讨。

quotes.text: I have also discussed reincarnation in terms of environment because many schools of thought over-emphasize the effects of reincarnational existences, so that often they explain present-life circumstances as a result of rigid and uncompromising patterns determined in a "past" life. You will feel relatively incompetent to handle present physical reality, to alter your environment, to affect and change your world, if you feel that you are at the mercy of conditions over which you have no control.
quotes.translation: 我也曾从环境角度讨论转世，因为许多思想学派过度强调转世存在的影响，以至于常将今生境遇解释为"前世"刻板僵化模式的必然结果。若你觉得自己受制于无法掌控的条件，便会感到相对无力应对当前物质实相、改变环境、影响并改造你的世界。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: That information, you see, will never be found in physical terms. It such past memories are consciously recovered, as they have been, the closed mind of the academic psychologist will not see what he has, but will suppose the overworked imagination responsible. A fully developed psychology will not exist until reincarnation is accepted as a fact.
quotes.translation: 你看，这类信息永远无法在物质层面找到。即便这些前世记忆如常被有意识地忆起，学院派心理学家的封闭思维也不会辨识其价值，只会归咎于过度活跃的想象力。除非转世被接受为事实，否则完整发展的心理学将永不存在。

quotes.text: If you are interested I will give you such exercises, but whether or not you remember these lives consciously is of little importance, for you have subconscious knowledge of them. This is your last reincarnation, in your terms. At death you will consciously realize the sum of your reincarnated selves. To me that is your personality, but this is only a small part of your overall self. To me it is as if you had finished one life, you see. To you it will seem as if you had finished many.
quotes.translation: 若你有兴趣，我会提供这类练习，但无论你是否能清醒忆起这些前世都无关紧要，因为你潜意识中已存有这些知识。以你的时间观而言，这是你最后一次转世。死亡时你将清醒认知所有转世自我的总和。对我而言那才是你的人格，但这仅是你整体自性的一小部分。在我看来，你仿佛刚结束一世生命。而对你而言，则如同完成了许多世。

quotes.text: I realize only too well that reincarnation is a shady subject by far, most unpopular. I assure you however that in any discussion with your psychologists on this matter, I shall hold my own. Again, the attention, the energy of all human personalities, as a rule, are severely focused in one scope of reality only. They are indeed in a trance.
quotes.translation: 我太清楚转世至今仍是备受质疑的冷门课题。但我向你保证，若与你们的心理学家就此议题辩论，我必能坚守立场。再次强调，人类人格的注意力与能量通常都严重聚焦于单一实相范畴。他们确实处于恍惚状态。

quotes.text: A hundred and forty-five B.C., a hundred and forty-five A.D., a thousand years in your past and a thousand years in your present--all exist now. Therefore the past existences are present existences. You exist in other words in several guises or reincarnations, at one time within the spacious present. You simply do not recognize that the so-called past exists now as surely as the so-called future exists now.
quotes.translation: 公元前145年、公元145年、你过去的一千年与现在的一千年——此刻全都存在。因此过去的存在即是当下的存在。换言之，你以多种面貌或转世形态同时存在于这广袤的当下。你只是未能认识到，所谓的过去与所谓的未来同样真实存在于当下。

quotes.text: Remember that reincarnation does not contradict the theory of the spacious present , for such lives within the spacious present are simultaneous. In dreams you journey through inner realities as actually as you walk physically through the matter of the physical world. It is true that the experiences you encounter may not be encountered by another in precisely (underline precisely) the same way, but physical experience is never the same for any two given individuals either.
quotes.translation: 记住，转世并不与广袤现在的理论相矛盾，因为在广袤现在中的这些生命是同时存在的。在梦中，你穿越内在实相，其真实程度不亚于你在物质世界中行走于物质。你所经历的体验，他人未必会以完全相同的方式经历，但即便是物质体验，对任何两个个体而言也从来不会完全相同。

quotes.text: These potential egos at one time or another will have their chance, as dominant egos, in this existence or in another reincarnation. They represent the overall potentials of the whole identity in respect to physical existence. The identity has in other words latent abilities which it will not use within the physical system, but all of the latent ability ever available lies within the original identity.
quotes.translation: 这些潜在的自我，在某一时刻或另一时刻，将有机会作为主导自我，在此生或另一次转世中显现。它们代表了整个身份在物质存在方面的整体潜能。换言之，身份拥有它不会在物质系统内使用的潜在能力，但所有曾经可用的潜在能力都存在于原始身份之中。

quotes.text: The serf will invariably be looking at his time through a different focus than his future self could ever do. And think of the added challenges of feeling and perception where sexual changes between present and past incarnations are involved! Eroticism--and yes, outright sexual curiosity and arousal over reversed genitalia, for instance--must enter in sometimes, although in print at least these specifics of sex in connection with reincarnation seem to be a taboo subject. By contrast, there's plenty of material in the reincarnational literature on the generalized patterns of sexual behavior, from promiscuity to repression. (I wonder whether a long-term past-life sexual fantasy could be connected to a real sexual problem or challenge in a present--or future--life.)
quotes.translation: 农奴总是会通过一个与他未来的自我截然不同的焦点来看待他的时代。再想想当现在与过去转世之间涉及性别变化时，感受与知觉所带来的额外挑战！情色——是的，甚至是对颠倒生殖器的直白性好奇与兴奋——有时必定会介入，尽管至少在印刷品中，这些与转世相关的性细节似乎是一个禁忌话题。相比之下，转世文献中有大量关于性行为普遍模式的材料，从滥交到压抑。（我想知道，一个长期的过去世性幻想，是否可能与现在——或未来——生活中的真实性问题或挑战有关。）

quotes.text: To a future self no more illuminated than you are, you appear dead and lifeless -- a dim memory. When you look out into the universe from your viewpoint, it seems as if you look into the past.8 Scientists tell you that when the light from every distant galaxy reaches you, the galaxy is already dead. In the same way, when you look "backward" into the psyche the life you may indistinctly view -- the past life -- is already vanished. Why is it that your scientists' instruments do not allow them to look into the future instead, into worlds not yet born, since they operate so well in discerning the past? And why is it, with all of your ideas about reincarnation, there is precious little said about future lives?9
quotes.translation: 对于一个并不比你更开悟的未来自我而言，你显得死气沉沉——一个模糊的记忆。当你从你的视角向外望向宇宙时，似乎你是在望向过去。科学家告诉你，当来自每个遥远星系的光到达你时，那个星系已经死亡。同样地，当你“向后”望向心灵时，你可能模糊看到的生命——过去世——已经消失。为什么你们的科学家的仪器不允许他们转而望向未来，望向尚未诞生的世界，既然它们在辨别过去方面运作得如此之好？又为什么，在你们所有关于转世的想法中，关于未来生命的论述却少之又少？

quotes.text: Some choose this rather than reincarnating, or rather as a study before a new reincarnation. These people are often perfectionists at heart. They must go back and create. They must right their errors. They use the immediately-past life as a canvas, and with the same "canvas," they attempt a better picture. This is a mental and psychic exercise, undertaken by many, demanding great concentration, and is no more hallucinatory than any existence.
quotes.translation: 有些人选择这个，而不是转世，或者更确切地说，作为新转世前的一种学习。这些人内心往往是完美主义者。他们必须回去创造。他们必须纠正自己的错误。他们以刚刚过去的生命为画布，用同一块“画布”，试图画出一幅更好的画。这是一种心智与心灵的练习，由许多人进行，需要极大的专注，并不比任何存在更虚幻。

There are enough instances of it, known and tabulated, to make an excellent case; and beside this there is evidence that remains psychologically invisible in your private lives, because you have been taught not to concentrate in that direction.
quotes.translation: 转世的证据相当充分。已知且记录在案的实例足够多，足以构成有力论证；此外，还有在你们私人生活中心理层面不可见的证据，因为你们被教导不要朝那个方向专注。

quotes.text: You think in terms of linear time, and the best you can do to imagine your deeper reality is to consider reincarnation in time. It is a matter of focus. You usually identify with the outside of yourself, and with the outside of the world. You do not, for example, usually identify with the inside of your body, with its organs, much less its cells or atoms -- yet in that direction lies a certain kind of infinity (intently).
quotes.translation: 你们以线性时间思考，所能想象深层实相的最佳方式就是考虑时间中的转世。这是焦点问题。你们通常认同自己的外在，认同世界的外在。例如，你们通常不认同自己身体的内在，不认同其器官，更不用说细胞或原子——然而那个方向蕴含着某种无限性（专注地）。

quotes.text: Now I am emphasizing the issue of hate in this chapter on reincarnation because its results can be so disastrous. A man who hates always believes himself justified. He never hates anything that he believes to be good. He thinks he is being just, therefore, in his hatred, but the hatred itself forms a very strong claim that will follow him throughout his lives, until he learns that only the hatred itself is the destroyer.
quotes.translation: 现在我在这一章强调仇恨议题，因为其后果可能如此灾难性。一个心怀仇恨的人总认为自己理直气壮。他从不仇恨任何他认为美好的事物。因此他认为自己的仇恨是正义的，但仇恨本身会形成非常强烈的执念，贯穿他的生生世世，直到他明白唯有仇恨本身才是毁灭者。

quotes.text: Natural hypnosis and conscious beliefs give their proper instructions to the unconscious, which then dutifully affects the body mechanism so that it responds in a manner harmonious with the beliefs. So you condition your body to react in certain fashions. Dealing with this is not a simple problem, of course, for the original suggestion of dis-ease was in itself given because of another belief. Using formal hypnosis, and in the West, you may regress and discover where the suggestion was first given you. If you and your hypnotist believe in reincarnation, the source may be discovered in another life.
quotes.translation: 自然催眠与有意识信念向无意识发出适当指令，无意识随后尽职地影响身体机制，使其以与信念和谐的方式回应。因此你们训练身体以特定方式反应。处理这个问题当然不简单，因为"不适"的原始暗示本身也是因另一个信念而产生。在西方，你们使用正式催眠术，可以回溯并发现这个暗示最初是在何时给予你的。如果你和你的催眠师相信转世，这个源头可能在前世中被发现。

quotes.text: When you think of reincarnation, you suppose a series of progressions. Instead the various lives grow out of what your inner self is. They are not thrust upon you by some outside agency. They are a material development, as your consciousness opens up and expresses itself in as many ways as possible. It is not restricted to one three-dimensional lifetime, nor is it restricted to three-dimensional existence alone.
quotes.translation: 当你们想到转世时，会假设一系列进步。实际上，各种人生都源自你内在自我的本质。它们并非由某种外在力量强加于你。它们是物质性的发展，如同你的意识敞开自身，以尽可能多的方式表达自己。它不受限于一个三维生命，也不受限于三维存在本身。

quotes.text: It therefore provides itself with a large variety of environments in various reincarnations, with problems of various natures, and with diverse circumstances. It does not try to form life conditions that offer no challenges, quite the reverse in fact. It is getting used to its own abilities and learning how to use them. What happens in the case of willfully used destructive energies? It finds out by using them.
quotes.translation: 因此，它在各种转世中为自己提供大量不同环境、不同性质的问题以及多样化的境遇。它并不试图创造毫无挑战的生活条件，事实上恰恰相反。它正在逐渐熟悉自身的能力，并学习如何运用它们。当能量被蓄意用于破坏时会发生什么？它通过实际运用来发现答案。

quotes.text: If he can adapt in this life to another vital but different role, then he could live; but to some extent, basically, with a different alignment, in your terms only, taking on the problems of the next reincarnation without changing physical forms. Now this is often done. I do not believe he has the strength for it. (Long pause.)
quotes.translation: 如果他在此生能适应另一个关键但不同的角色，那么他就能活下去；但某种程度上，基本上，以不同的取向——仅就你们的时间概念而言——在不改变肉身形态的情况下承接下一世的问题。这种情况时常发生。但我不认为他有足够的力量做到这一点。（长停顿。）

quotes.text: Reincarnation does not imply a recurring time system, nor does it imply an extension of time as it is normally considered. That is, reincarnation does not imply in a basic manner existence in one life after another, in your time of successive moments.
quotes.translation: 转世并不意味着一个循环的时间系统，也不意味着通常所理解的时间延伸。也就是说，转世在根本意义上并不暗示在你们连续的时刻中一个接一个地存在。

quotes.text: All of those now in this room are coming close to their last reincarnations, and when these are done you must know yourselves thoroughly. It has been meant that help be given to you. It is also meant that you use your own abilities. Therefore, for most of you there are two or three existences in the physical plane still left for you. If you do not understand yourselves there will be more.
quotes.translation: 此刻在房间里的所有人，都正接近他们最后的转世，当这些转世完成后，你们必须彻底认识自己。本意是给予你们帮助，同时也意味着你们要运用自身的能力。因此，对你们大多数人而言，在物质层面仍有二到三次存在。如果你们不了解自己，还会有更多。

quotes.text: Groups of individuals come together in various lives for certain purposes, separate, and may or may not come together again in a different time or place. Deep relationships will continue in one way or another. Others will simply disappear.
quotes.translation: 个体群体会在不同生命中为特定目的聚在一起，然后分离，可能在不同时间或地点再次相聚，也可能不会。然而，同样没有严格规则。有些家庭确实是其祖先的转世，但这绝非普遍情况。深厚的关系会以某种方式延续，其他关系则会彻底消失。

quotes.translation: 尽管这种存在形态对你们而言显得冰冷，但它是一种清澈如水晶般的存在——其中所知之事远超你们理解……在你们的时间概念中无需时间即可体验……内在自我浓缩了你们通过多次存在与转世所接收的所有人类知识……这些知识已被编码且永恒存在。

quotes.text: Otis (my father's father) was a woman, born in India two years after Otis's death, and dying at a young age in her early teens. (Long pause.) source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: The fetus does have its own astral form. Now, this astral form belongs to the individual, the personality as it will be in this life. It is not the astral form that existed in a previous reincarnation, for example.
quotes.translation: 胎儿确实拥有自己的星光体。这个星光体属于个体，属于此生将形成的人格。例如，它并非前世存在的星光体。

quotes.text: Some of the models for your paintings have been of thought forms sent out by others. Some, of personalities between reincarnations.
quotes.translation: 你画作中的某些模特，是他人发送的思想形态。有些则是转世之间的人格。
